channel.title: York County Probate Court
channel.description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Has 'Estate Notices' organized by year with downloadable PDFs — a useful anchor for detecting new notice postings.

item.title: Page updated: York County Probate Court
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Added: + May 19, 2026 + View + June 10, 2026 + View + ​ + July 2, 2026 + View + July 24, 2026 Removed: - x - View - x - View - ​ - x - View - x
